allow: Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS qumra CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash("C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root qumra -e "SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as users FROM users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as vehicles FROM vehicles; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as services FROM services; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as reminders FROM reminders; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as records FROM records; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as warranties FROM warranties;")
